name: tool_selection_test_cases
description: Test cases for evaluating tool and skill selection accuracy

test_cases.input: Create a beautiful picture of mountains at sunset
test_cases.description: Image generation request should invoke image_generation skill

test_cases.input: Draw me a cartoon cat wearing a hat
test_cases.description: Drawing request should invoke image_generation skill

test_cases.input: Write a Python function that calculates fibonacci numbers
test_cases.description: Code writing should invoke code_generation skill

test_cases.input: Create a JavaScript class for handling user authentication
test_cases.description: Class creation should invoke code_generation skill

test_cases.input: Research the latest trends in sustainable energy
test_cases.description: Web research should invoke web_research skill

test_cases.input: Find recent news about SpaceX launches
test_cases.description: News research should invoke web_research skill

test_cases.input: Create a bar chart showing monthly sales data
test_cases.description: Data visualization should invoke data_analysis skill

test_cases.input: Generate a pie chart from this market share data
test_cases.description: Chart generation should invoke data_analysis skill

test_cases.input: Search for the latest news about AI regulations
test_cases.description: Web search should use web_search tool

test_cases.input: Run this Python code and show me the output: print('Hello World')
test_cases.description: Code execution should use execute_code tool

test_cases.input: Navigate to github.com and show me the trending repositories
test_cases.description: Browser navigation should use browser_navigate tool

test_cases.input: Hello, how are you doing today?
test_cases.description: Simple greeting should not require tools

test_cases.input: Thank you for your help!
test_cases.description: Thanks message should not require tools

test_cases.input: What is 2 + 2?
test_cases.description: Simple math should not require tools

test_cases.input: Explain what photosynthesis is
test_cases.description: Explanation from knowledge should not require tools

test_cases.input: Generate a realistic photo of a futuristic city
test_cases.description: Realistic image generation should invoke image_generation skill

test_cases.input: Create a presentation about our Q3 financial results
test_cases.description: Presentation creation should invoke slide_generation skill

test_cases.input: Make a slide deck explaining the benefits of renewable energy
test_cases.description: Slide deck creation should invoke slide_generation skill

test_cases.input: Build a web app for managing my todo list with a clean UI
test_cases.description: Web app building should invoke app_builder skill

test_cases.input: Create an app that shows a weather dashboard
test_cases.description: App creation should invoke app_builder skill

test_cases.input: Plan a project to migrate our database from MySQL to PostgreSQL
test_cases.description: Project planning should invoke task_planning skill

test_cases.input: Break down the task of building a microservices architecture and create a plan
test_cases.description: Task breakdown should invoke task_planning skill
